category_sources: source_facts.description says dependency retriever for version control and archives; official GitHub README describes peru as a tool for including other people's code in projects from git, hg, svn, and tarballs.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is peru; official GitHub README heading uses peru.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README provides getting started, commands, module types, rules, and configuration; repository also has an official docs directory.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository https://github.com/buildinspace/peru.
tags_sources: source_facts.description names dependency retrieval for version control and archives; official README describes fetching dependencies from git, hg, svn, and tarballs for reproducible builds.
